channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: Negotiate pay in 2026 with AI proof points
item.description: Prove your value in 2026 with AI-proof compensation evidence — human-commit ratios, delivery metrics, and negotiation slides that finance actually accepts.

item.title: AWS cost levers 2026: the 3 that cut bills 30%
item.description: Cut AWS bills 30% with the 3 levers that actually work in 2026 — Savings Plans, Compute Optimizer, and Cost Anomaly Detection — and the exact commitment math most teams get wrong.

item.title: Pick one: Stripe, Lemon Squeezy, Paddle in 2026
item.description: Lemon Squeezy markets itself as indie-friendly, but their API is still 40% slower than Stripe’s under load and their chargeback handling feels like 2018.

item.title: Self-healing pipelines: Argo vs Crossplane in 2026
item.description: Cut mean time to recovery 70% with self-healing CI/CD — Argo CD vs Crossplane performance and cost compared using 2026 data from production clusters.

item.title: Freelance AI pricing drops 40% by 2026
item.description: AI tools cut freelance rates 40% in 2026 — $60–$90/h is the new baseline when clients audit Copilot usage. Learn the deliverable-based pricing playbook and the exact contract clauses to keep invoices above $80/h.

item.title: 9 AI wrapper APIs that paid off in 2026
item.description: Cut AI transcription costs 36% with wrappers that actually work — Speechmatics 2.2, AssemblyAI 2025.11, and Deepgram Nova-3 Fast 3.1 are the only ones that survived 2026.

item.title: Skip the VPN tax: Zero-trust on $200/month
item.description: Cut API latency 40% and skip VPN costs with Cloudflare Tunnel or Tailscale in 2026. Benchmark numbers, cost breakdowns, and the exact setup I use for small teams.

item.title: 7 AI tools Nairobi devs use to beat global teams
item.description: Cut feature delivery time 35% with GitHub Copilot Enterprise — the tools Nairobi devs use to beat global teams without burning cash

item.title: AI ops vs dumb alerts: the incident that broke us
item.description: Cut false positives 75% with minimal paging alerts — Prometheus Alertmanager 0.26 beats FireHydrant AI 2.6 in 2026 by trusting humans over LLMs.

item.title: Store data once, serve everywhere: cheaper
item.description: Cut cross-region egress 70% with edge caching — real latency, cost, and failure modes from a 2026 health-data backend serving Nigeria, Kenya, and South Africa.

item.title: Replace Pinecone with pgvector
item.description: Cut vector search costs 95% with pgvector on PostgreSQL 16 — real benchmarks, migration steps, and the recall trade-offs most teams ignore

item.title: AI prompts poisoned: 3 real attacks on live systems
item.description: Block 0.28% of malicious prompts before they poison your AI — regex vs ML guardrails, latency costs, and the €6.4k incidents most teams miss in 2026

item.title: Tool calls at scale: sync vs async patterns that live
item.description: Cut API latency 62% and infra cost 17% with async tool calls — connection pools, queue depths, and the async leak mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Regulations killed our elegant APIs
item.description: Cut API breach risk 100% with idempotency keys and 425 Too Early responses — how Nigeria’s 2025 Data Protection Act rewrote fintech API design in 2026.

item.title: Claude Code after a year: daily wins
item.description: Cut patch review time 74% with Claude Code in 2026 — real costs, rollback logic, and the one metric your team should watch first

item.title: Design AI flows, not chat UIs
item.description: Cut AI app latency 60% with structured state machines instead of chat UIs. Learn the event-driven patterns that work in production today — schemas, validation, and cache strategies most tutorials skip.

item.title: Roll your own migrations: why blue-green fails you
item.description: Zero-downtime PostgreSQL migrations cost $7k/year in blue-green setups — here’s the pattern that cut our downtime to 0 seconds without extra infra 2026

item.title: Fix Daraja 2.0 breaks in 2026
item.description: Cut M-Pesa Daraja 2.0 migration time 70% — Business Shortcode, TLS 1.3, SHA-256 signatures and C2B webhooks with step-by-step code and error codes

item.title: 3 side gigs that paid me 2k USD/month in 2026
item.description: Earn 2k USD/month in 2026 without building a SaaS — real tools, real numbers, and the exact scripts I reused three times to hit 1,800 USD in two weeks.

item.title: AWS IAM in 10 minutes: stop writing policies by hand
item.description: Cut IAM policy work 70% with AWS Identity Center — permission sets, boundaries, and Access Analyzer in 2026 with concrete AWS services and real results.
